Community Breastfeeding Coalition of El Dorado County
We Can Help
The Breastfeeding Coalition of El Dorado County is a nonprofit organization that is here to help. Breastfeeding provides significant health benefits and we're here to provide mothers with the resources and support they need - including education, professional and peer support, and access to breast pumps.
Contact Us
Jess Cullen at 530-919-6929
The Breastfeeding Coalition of El Dorado County offers community meetings and support to answer your questions and help raise awareness of breastfeeding benefits.
Learn more about the coalition.
Visit the EDC Community Breastfeeding Coalition Facebook page
News and Events
On July 30, 2024, the County of El Dorado Board of Supervisors proclaimed August as Breastfeeding Awareness Month, recognizing the benefits of breastfeeding and the programs that educate, support, and promote breastfeeding in El Dorado County.
Read the Proclamation here:
Board of Supervisors of the County of El Dorado Proclamation - August 2024 Breastfeeding Awareness Month.pdf
(PDF, 485KB)
